name: Saunders International Limited
analysis: SND's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.0600. Trade idea: entry A$1.0800, stop A$0.9875, target A$1.3574 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
